description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rough, weathered surface and a muted, earthy coloration. The rock features jagged edges and uneven faces, with some flatter surfaces that could potentially support small objects. Its texture is coarse, with visible grain and natural indentations typical of sedimentary or weathered stone. The coloration is predominantly a dusty brownish-gray, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements for some time. There are no visible markings, graffiti, or artificial modifications on its surface. The rock appears solid and dense, suitable for use as a natural barrier or landscaping element in an urban environment.
description: A medium, irregular, rough-textured brownish-gray rock with jagged edges and natural weathering, typical of urban landscaping or barrier use.
description_view_0: Narrow, jagged side of the rock with visible rough texture and some angular protrusions.
description_view_1: Longest, flattest face of the rock, showing the most surface area and a more uniform texture.
description_view_2: Another angled, irregular side with deep crevices and a rugged profile.
description_view_3: Broad, slightly curved face with a consistent rough surface and muted coloration.
